name: Berry Waffles
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon egg replacer (mixed with 6 tbsp water)
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the wheat berries and soy milk until smooth.
2. Mix the remaining ingredients, including the egg replacer mixed with water, in a separate bowl.
3. Combine the two mixtures.
4. Heat a waffle iron and cook for 6 to 7 minutes on high heat.
5. Cooking time longer than 7 minutes will result in crispier waffles but may cause burning.
This recipe yields about 3 cups of batter and makes approximately 3 standard-sized waffles. Each serving contains 259 calories, with a total fat content of 2 grams (6% of daily value), protein at 9 grams (14% of daily value), carbohydrates at 52 grams (81% of daily value), sodium at 861 mg, fiber at 2 grams, iron at 2 mg, and vitamin A at 3 IU.
